action: Verified mobile touch support is fully shipped and live. All CSS (touch-controls, touch-dpad, touch-btn, restart-btn, responsive canvas, mobile header), HTML (restartBtn, touchControls), and JS (renderTouchControls, restartGame, backToGrid cleanup) are implemented per design doc. Board escalation is resolved.
rationale: Board directive flagged mobile touch as unbuilt, but it was already implemented in a prior cycle. Confirmed live on frontend (3 touch-controls references in served HTML). Tetris also correctly gets 4-way d-pad.
nextStep: Build keyboard-focus-accessibility (design doc exists, ready for implementation)
